draft:
Subject: Re: Contract Feedback: Enterprise Licensing Tiers and Pricing Inquiry

Dear Clara Peters,

Thank you for your email and for considering Hermes Email Intelligence platform for RetailGiant. We appreciate your positive feedback on our pipeline capabilities.

We understand your budget constraints and are committed to finding a solution that aligns with your needs. I will discuss your request with our sales team and get back to you promptly with potential adjustments to the licensing parameters.

Thank you for your patience and for considering a partnership with Hermes. We look forward to resolving this matter swiftly and efficiently.

Best regards,

[Your Name] Hermes Sales Team
original_subject: Contract Feedback: Enterprise Licensing Tiers and Pricing Inquiry
original_body:
Hello Hermes Sales Team,
We have completed our evaluation of the Hermes Email Intelligence platform and are highly satisfied with the pipeline capabilities. Our legal and operations teams are ready to move forward.
However, the custom pricing schedule sent over by your account executive ($45,000 annually for 20 seats) exceeds our budget cap for operational tools this quarter by roughly 20%.
We are looking to secure licensing for 15 seats instead, or want to know if you can offer a 15% discount on the 20-seat package if we sign a multi-year (3-year) contract commit.
Please let us know if we can adjust these licensing parameters so we can proceed with execution this week.
est,
Clara Peters
Head of Procurement, RetailGiant

If you are the intended recipient of this message, you should not disclose or distribute or forward it to third parties without the consent of our company.
